props.name: value
props.description: The numeric value to display in the counter.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: The base font size used for the counter digits.

props.name: padding
props.description: Additional padding added to the digit height.

props.name: places
props.description: Defines which digit positions to display. Include whole number and decimal place values (use "." for the decimal point). If omitted, place values will be detected automatically.

props.name: gap
props.description: The gap (in pixels) between each digit.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: The border radius (in pixels) for the counter container.

props.name: horizontalPadding
props.description: The horizontal padding (in pixels) for the counter container.

props.name: textColor
props.description: The text color for the counter digits.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Custom inline styles for the outer container.

props.name: counterStyle
props.description: Custom inline styles for the counter element.

props.name: digitStyle
props.description: Custom inline styles for each digit container.

props.name: gradientHeight
props.description: The height (in pixels) of the gradient overlays.

props.name: gradientFrom
props.description: The starting color for the gradient overlays.

props.name: gradientTo
props.description: The ending color for the gradient overlays.

props.name: topGradientStyle
props.description: Custom inline styles for the top gradient overlay.

props.name: bottomGradientStyle
props.description: Custom inline styles for the bottom gradient overlay.
